title: TypeScript conformance
summary: Human-authored TypeScript and TSX MUST conform to the repository TypeScript style guide and configured formatter.
instructions: Agents MUST inspect the normative sections of governance/handbooks/typescript/style-guide.md before implementing or reviewing TypeScript.
Agents MUST run the configured formatter and type checker before completion and MUST treat formatter output as authoritative.
Agents MUST NOT inspect Appendix A during ordinary implementation or review unless they are changing formatter configuration or integration.
